hero.title: Master the Art of Trading

coach.title: Meet Your Trading Coach
coach.name: Ahmed Hunter
coach.bio_intro: After losing $50,000 in my first year of trading, I decided to dedicate my life to mastering the markets.
coach.bio_struggle: The journey wasn't easy. I studied hundreds of strategies, attended seminars, and learned from the biggest names in trading. But nothing worked until I developed my own systematic approach.
coach.bio_success: Today, I've helped over 10,000 students worldwide achieve consistent profits. My methods are based on real market experience, not theory.

results.title: Real Trading Results
results.subtitle: These aren't hypothetical numbers. Every trade, every profit shown here is real and verifiable.

testimonials.title: What Our Students Say
testimonials.subtitle: Don't just take our word for it. Here's what real traders have to say about their journey with Hunter Trading.

courses.subtitle: From beginner to advanced, our structured courses take you through every aspect of profitable trading.

signals.title: Market Watch
signals.subtitle: Get real-time trading signals delivered directly to your device. High accuracy, transparent results.
signals.disclaimer: Signals use a short-term momentum strategy with EMA trend and candle volatility. They are educational and not financial advice.
